text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, March 23. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that researching rover power systems in depth. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I've indexed the research notes. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Good way to wrap up the day. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Doing some cleaning around the house. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Sounds exciting! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Healthy choices are great. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hosted a game night at our place. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've mapped the locations. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds like a sweet moment. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Researching rover power systems in depth. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a clean implementation. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Relaxation mode active. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. I can help troubleshoot that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: I've got the schedule covered. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning our weekly meals today. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the grocery list ready. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. I've mapped the locations. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
